_comment: S2 Coordination State — Schema v1. Seeded by orchestrator at dispatch time. Agents read at startup, update during/after work. Lives at <worktree>/.pact/s2-state.json.
created_at: ISO 8601 timestamp — when this file was first seeded
created_by: orchestrator command that seeded this file (orchestrate or comPACT)

boundaries._comment: Agent scope boundaries. Directory prefixes MUST end with '/'. Orchestrator sets these at dispatch time.

conventions._comment: Append-only array. Readers resolve by taking the LAST entry per 'key'. This means later entries override earlier ones for the same key, preserving full audit trail.
conventions.value: camelCase for functions, PascalCase for types

scope_claims._comment: Files actually modified by each agent. Updated by agents before completion.

drift_alerts._comment: Generated by drift detection hook (Phase C) when an agent edits a file in another agent's 'owns' scope.
